member.office_address: 1314 Longworth House Office Building Washington DC 20515-1317

form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Please submit ONE request on this form, and submit the form repeatedly for additional individual requests. This form is strictly for Programmatic and Language requests, not Community Project Funding.

sections.description: Basic information about the submitter and the nature of the request.

fields.label: What type of request is this?
fields.help_text: Indicate if this is a request for funding (Programmatic) or policy guidance (Language).
fields.rationale: This is a request for $9,000,000,000 in programmatic funding for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Is this request a priority for another member of Congress?
fields.rationale: This request is being submitted to multiple offices.

fields.label:
If you selected Yes for the previous question, which member of Congress?

*Please write response as Rep. John Smith (IL-01)*
fields.draft_value: Rep. Don Bacon (R-NE) and Rep. Judy Chu (D-CA)
fields.rationale: Referenced lead members of the existing House support letter mentioned in the congressional support context.

sections.description: Details for funding requests related to specific federal programs.

fields.label: Subcommittee
fields.help_text: The House Appropriations Subcommittee with jurisdiction over the request.
options: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies (CJS)
Military Construction, Veterans' Affairs, & Related Agencies (MILCON & VA)
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies (CJS)
fields.rationale: NASA funding falls under the jurisdiction of the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Subcommittee.

fields.label: Program title:
fields.rationale: Standard program name for this SMD funding request.

fields.label: Agency and Division/Bureau:
fields.rationale: The agency responsible for the Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Account:
fields.rationale: The specific appropriations account for SMD.

fields.label: Activity/subactivity (if applicable):
fields.rationale: The request is for the topline Science account.

fields.label: (For DOD Submissions ONLY) PE & Line:
fields.help_text: Program Element and Line Number for Department of Defense requests.
fields.rationale: This is a NASA request, not a Department of Defense submission.

fields.label: Short (4-5 Sentence) purpose/description of program:
fields.draft_value:
* NASA's Science Mission Directorate (SMD) explores the Solar System, Earth, and the universe to expand human knowledge and protect our home planet.
* The program executes high-priority missions identified by the National Academies' Decadal Surveys across astrophysics, planetary science, heliophysics, and Earth science.
* SMD maintains the United States' global leadership in space through a fleet of robotic spacecraft, telescopes, and cutting-edge technical innovation.
* Beyond discovery, SMD drives economic growth by investing in the domestic aerospace supply chain and inspiring the next generation of the STEM workforce.
fields.rationale: This description aligns with the SMD's core mission and emphasizes U.S. leadership and economic impact as outlined in the Advocacy Talking Points.

fields.label: FY2026 enacted funding level:
fields.help_text: Enter the dollar amount enacted in the previous fiscal year.
fields.rationale: Uses the authoritative FY2026 enacted figure provided in the reference values.

fields.label: President's FY2027 budget request (if applicable):
fields.rationale: The FY2027 President's Budget Request has not yet been released.

fields.label: Your Request:
fields.help_text: The specific dollar amount requested for FY2027.
fields.rationale: Uses the specific FY2027 funding ask amount for NASA SMD.

fields.label: Was this same request made to other Representatives or Senators? If so, Who?
fields.draft_value: Rep. Don Bacon (R-NE) and Rep. Judy Chu (D-CA)
fields.rationale: Citing the known House leads for the existing support letter.

fields.label: Priority (if submitting more than one, please rank)
fields.rationale: Priority ranking is a user-specific determination based on their full list of requests.

fields.label: What, if any, is the request's connection to IL-17?
fields.draft_value:
* NASA Science has invested $29,840 within IL-17 across the FY2023-FY2025 period, supporting local industrial capabilities.
* Triple L Group, LLC in the district was awarded $29,840 in NASA contract funding to support agency objectives.
* These funds contribute to the local economy by supporting high-tech jobs and maintaining Illinois' role in the national aerospace ecosystem.
* Robust SMD funding ensures continued opportunities for district-based businesses to compete for specialized NASA contracts.
fields.rationale: Based on NASA spending data for IL-17, identifying Triple L Group, LLC as a local recipient of $29,840.

fields.label: Did you meet with a Member of Rep. Sorensen's staff regarding this request? If so, who and on what date?
fields.rationale: This is a user-specific question about personal meetings that cannot be answered with provided context.

fields.label: Upload any supporting PDFs here (if applicable)
fields.rationale: File must be attached manually.

sections.description: Details for requests involving specific report or bill language.

fields.label: Subcommittee
options: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies (CJS)
Military Construction, Veterans' Affairs, & Related Agencies (MILCON & VA)
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies (CJS)
fields.rationale: NASA funding falls under the jurisdiction of the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Subcommittee.

fields.label: Agency and Division/Bureau:
fields.rationale: This field belongs to the language request section which is not applicable for this programmatic request.

fields.label: (For DOD Submissions ONLY) PE & Line:
fields.rationale: This is a NASA Science Mission Directorate request, not a Department of Defense (DOD) request; this section is non-applicable.

fields.label: Language title:
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request, not a language request.

fields.label: Proposed Language:
fields.draft_value:
- This programmatic request would fund NASA's Science Mission Directorate at $9,000,000,000.
- Funding at this level supports the scientific community's peer-reviewed consensus on priority missions as outlined in the National Academies Decadal Surveys.
- Sustained investment ensures U.S. leadership in space science and maintains the integrity of the aerospace and technology workforce across the country.
fields.rationale: The request is defined as programmatic in the reference values, and no specific bill or report language is provided.

fields.label: Purpose of Proposed Language
fields.draft_value:
- To provide $9 billion in programmatic funding for NASA's Science Mission Directorate (SMD) to ensure continued U.S. leadership in space exploration and research.
- To restore stability to the aerospace workforce and prevent further losses of critical scientific capabilities following recent budget fluctuations.
- To enable NASA to execute peer-reviewed priorities established by the National Academies' Decadal Surveys, which drive transformative breakthroughs in our understanding of the universe.
fields.rationale: No language is being proposed; this is a programmatic funding request for $9 billion.

fields.label: Is this issue or account mentioned in the President's Budget Request? Describe:
fields.draft_value:
* The FY2027 President's Budget Request (PBR) has not yet been released for congressional review.
* In the previous cycle (FY2026), the PBR requested $3.908 billion for NASA Science, a figure Congress significantly increased to $7.250 billion.
* This $9 billion request represents a 24% increase over the FY2026 enacted level to restore mission timelines and support Decadal Survey priorities.
* NASA Science is a permanent account within the President's Budget under the Science Mission Directorate.
fields.rationale: Provides historical context regarding the PBR vs. Enacted amounts for SMD as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Was this same request made to other Representatives or Senators? If so, Who?
fields.rationale: Section not applicable for programmatic requests.

fields.label: Priority (if submitting more than one, please rank)
fields.rationale: Section not applicable for programmatic requests.

fields.label: What, if any, is the request's connection to IL-17?
fields.draft_value:
* NASA Science has invested $29,840 within IL-17 across the FY2023-FY2025 period, supporting local industrial capabilities.
* Triple L Group, LLC in the district was awarded $29,840 in NASA contract funding to support agency objectives.
* These funds contribute to the local economy by supporting high-tech jobs and maintaining Illinois' role in the national aerospace ecosystem.
* Robust SMD funding ensures continued opportunities for district-based businesses to compete for specialized NASA contracts.
fields.rationale: Identical to the previous connection field, citing local spending data for Triple L Group, LLC.

fields.label: Did you meet with a Member of Rep. Sorensen's staff regarding this request? If so, who and on what date?
fields.rationale: This is a user-specific question that cannot be answered with provided context.
